registryAdminToken: <Asset Registry ADMIN_TOKEN; omit to use the public verify-on-chain endpoint instead>
seqFeeAsset: <hex asset id or label of any accepted fee asset the bridge wallet holds; no need for the Sequence token>
sbtcBridgeToken: <the sbtc-bridge HTTP token; the daemon proxies /btc/wrap + /btc/unwrap to it so the browser never holds a secret. Omit to disable the Bitcoin bridge.>
